ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Branden Meadows by CourtCall for petitioner Sharon Nichols.

Mr. Meadows stated that no signature page of the will has been located, but that the Petitioner is the sole beneficiary, so no one would be prejudiced by admitting the will. The Court granted the petition for probate of will, subject to review of the order and submission of a bond in the sum of $20,000.00. The case was set for a status hearing re close of estate on August 24, 2020, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)
